'''√sh-b-v''' ('''kashabav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:maggot|maggot]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-b-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:maggot|maggot]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √sh-b-v
|-
! Lemma
| kashabav
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thishabav || jishabav || shishabav || kishabav
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthushabav || jujushabav || shushushabav || kukushabav
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thushabav || jushabav || shushabav || kushabav
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thushabav || jushabav || shushabav || kushabav
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || theshabav || jeshabav || sheshabav || keshabav
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothoshabav || jojoshabav || shoshoshabav || kokoshabav
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thoshabav || joshabav || shoshabav || koshabav
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thoshabav || joshabav || shoshabav || koshabav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || shabav || shabav || shabav || shabav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || shabav || shabav || shabav || shabav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || shabav || shabav || shabav || shabav
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || shabav || shabav || shabav || shabav
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæshabav || jæshabav || shæshabav || kæshabav
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathashabav || jajashabav || shashashabav || kakashabav
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thashabav || jashabav || shashabav || kashabav
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thashabav || jashabav || shashabav || kashabav
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shashabav
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshashabav
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishashabav
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shashabavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshashabavnknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishashabavnü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shashabavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshashabavnkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishashabavshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shashabavro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshashabavnkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishashabavro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shashabavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshashabavnkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishashabavmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shashabavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshashabavnksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishashabavsher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shashabavng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshashabavnkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishashabavng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shashabavya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshashabavnkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishashabavya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shashabavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshashabavnkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishashabavyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shashabavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshashabavnknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishashabavnüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shashabavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashabavnknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashabavnüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shashabavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshashabavnknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashabavnümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shashabavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshashabavnkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishashabavshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shashabavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashabavnkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashabavshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shashabavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshashabavnkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashabavshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shashabavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshashabavnkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishashabavronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shashabavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshashabavnkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishashabavroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shashabavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshashabavnkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishashabavromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shashabavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshashabavnkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishashabavmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shashabavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshashabavnkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishashabavmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shashabavmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshashabavnkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishashabavmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|d176386}}
